experience_source: MarketMaker CRE - Promotion and Project Manager Ownership

points.point_title: Role Expansion from Business Analyst Intern to Project Manager
points.base_resume_point: Expanded from a Business Analyst Intern into a Project Manager role by taking ownership of business analysis, product execution, cross-functional coordination, and strategic initiatives in a fast-paced commercial real estate analytics startup.

evidence_proof: Responsibilities expanded into Project Manager role
Oversaw key initiatives supporting growth and scalability
adaptation_direction: For Business Operations Associate roles, frame as expanding ownership across operations, product, and strategy.
For Program Analyst roles, frame as moving into project execution and cross-functional coordination.
For Product Operations Analyst roles, frame as taking ownership of product delivery and business alignment.

points.point_title: Business Requirements and Platform Usability Improvement
points.base_resume_point: Gathered and defined business requirements for MarketMaker’s flagship real estate data analytics platform, translating stakeholder needs into functional specifications that improved usability and helped buyers and sellers make more informed decisions.

evidence_proof: Gathered business requirements for flagship analytics platform
Translated user needs into functional specifications
Contributed to 20% enhancement in user experience
adaptation_direction: For Business Systems Analyst roles, frame as translating stakeholder needs into platform requirements.
For Product Operations Analyst roles, frame as improving product usability through requirements alignment.
For Solutions Analyst roles, frame as connecting user problems to platform capabilities.

points.point_title: SQL-Based Data Analysis and Customer Retention Improvement
points.base_resume_point: Used SQL to consolidate and analyze commercial real estate data trends, aligning property offerings with client demand and improving customer-property matching to support stronger retention and business decision-making.

evidence_proof: Used SQL to consolidate property data
Identified data trends aligned with client demand
Contributed to 22% increase in customer retention
adaptation_direction: For Customer Value Analyst roles, frame as improving retention through better client-property alignment.
For Revenue Operations Analyst roles, frame as retention and revenue protection through data analysis.
For Strategy & Operations Associate roles, frame as using data insights to guide business decisions.

points.base_resume_point: Created clear reports and data visualizations from property-data analysis to help internal teams and clients interpret insights, make informed decisions, and improve overall operational efficiency.

evidence_proof: Helped clients leverage data for decision-making
adaptation_direction: For Strategy & Operations Associate roles, frame as turning analysis into decision support.
For Business Operations Associate roles, frame as improving operating visibility.
For Customer Value Analyst roles, frame as helping clients understand and act on insights.
